subject: docs(session): update all docs to reflect final state of branch
body:
SESSION_NOTES: Updated to 12 projects (was 11), added four-ems to
private repos list, added all accomplishments from later in session
(URL fixes, XSS fixes, mobile UX, CI update, doc guide updates).

HISTORY: Rewrote 2026-03-31 entry as comprehensive changelog grouped
by category (landing page, design, bugs, mobile, CI, docs). Fixed
repo count from 10 to 12.

TODO: Added outstanding work items — model-pear and see-veo need
User Guide, Testing Guide, and Tutorial. sun-sea-o and four-ems
need TutorialModal.
